human_red_team.comment_provenance: the five NUMERIC scores (91/93/84/91/89, avg 89.6) are Junyan's VERBATIM five-axis red-team of the 澜起 deep thesis (#77 chat verdict, conditional PASS, 2026-06-14); the two P1 fixes he required (earnings-bridge bull-row column order; in-file source appendix) were applied before #77 merged. The per-axis COMMENTS here are a faithful T1 summary of each axis's basis in this sheet (the #77 verdict recorded scores without verbatim per-axis prose) — NOT presented as Junyan's words. Scores bind to the composer sheet content_lock f7e3b135ecc0a012 (public/data/decision_sheets/688008_SH.json), which encodes the same red-teamed deep thesis; committed reference price 229.28 (universe_a 2026-06-12) vs the deep thesis's web ¥228 (inside its flagged 225-231 conflict band) — both yield the same WATCH conclusion.

specificity.comment: [T1 summary] 拆到 Q1 一次性公允价值收益 2.39亿、扣非 +20.1% vs 表观 +61.3%、新品占互连 11.9%→19% 斜率、互连毛利 62.66%→65.57%→71.5% — 不是空泛叙事。

falsifiability.comment: [T1 summary] 4 条 wrong_if 绑季报强制披露(新品占比、互连毛利率、单季营收、扣非同比),H1 报告可直接打脸。

valuation_discipline.comment: [T1 summary] 三场景 earnings bridge(营收→毛利→opex→归母→EPS×forward PE)+ 显式假设 + R/R 自然推出;倍数仍是 [unvalidated intuition] 判断锚,但已足够做研究决策。最弱轴。

information_increment.comment: [T1 summary] '表观+61% vs 真实+20%(一次性)''卖方营收偏高 58 vs 70-77''第二曲线真实但仅占 19% 托不住 81% base' 是实质增量,不是普通摘要能稳定产出的。

risk_identification.comment: [T1 summary] base 减速、政策/周期、估值双杀、8/9 港股基石解禁供给、拥挤反身都覆盖,且没有 over-bear(承认第二曲线是真的)。

The five axis scores and the 87.2 average are Junyan's owner-authorized FLOOR judgment, recorded after the PR-G #86 一手财务对账门 verified the load-bearing numbers against the filed cninfo PDFs (Q1'26 归母 105.95亿; FY2025 352.86亿; 股本 198.44亿). The per-axis comments below are a faithful summary of each axis's basis in this sheet (NOT presented as verbatim quotes). This is NOT an agent or self score — it is Junyan's owner-authorized red-team floor; the prior 87.2 figure is used only as supporting audit context.

specificity.comment: [owner floor; summary] 拆到 Q1'26 105.95亿/扣非 102.50亿/OCF 250.24亿、FY25 352.86亿、forward PE 23-28x、ODM 净利率 ~3-4% 的承重变量,不是空泛叙事

falsifiability.comment: [owner floor; summary] wrong-if 绑半年报强制披露:H1 归母年化 <450亿 / 分部毛利率 <6% / 营收增而净利率不改善,H1 报告可直接打脸

valuation_discipline.comment: [owner floor; summary] 三档 earnings bridge(归母×forward PE÷198.44亿股)+ 显式假设;R/R 1.72<2:1 的结论自然推出;倍数仍 [unvalidated intuition],但已足够做研究决策。最弱轴
